risk_flags.summary: Portfolio exposure depends on a concentrated AI power-demand theme.
Several thesis catalysts cluster around regulatory, customer, and financing updates.

risks: Add or refresh a source-backed concentration risk if the portfolio exposure makes the single-ledger risk material.
checklist: Add an open review item to compare thesis catalysts with portfolio-level exposure limits.
reviews: Record whether portfolio concentration changes the next review cadence.

risk_flags.summary: Daily-reset exposure can dominate portfolio volatility during stressed conditions.
Position sizing should remain tied to liquidity and exit rules.

risks: Keep leverage and path-dependence risks explicit and source-backed.
position_rules: Keep maximum exposure, holding-period, and stop-review rules open until checked before action.
checklist: Add a portfolio-risk review item before increasing exposure.

decision_review_pack_usage.consume: Translate approved risk flags into ordinary ledger fields, then run decision-review-pack.
decision_review_pack_usage.complement: Keep this artifact beside the packet as portfolio context; the packet remains ledger-native and reproducible.

non_advice_boundary: Research organization example only; no buy, sell, or hold recommendation is made.
